_comment: IOI (Indirect Object Identification) feature catalog for Makelov validation. Ground truth labels are deterministic from the template construction — no LLM needed.

features.description: Role of the token as a name in the IOI circuit
Token is the indirect object name (the name that appears only once)
Token is the first occurrence of the subject name (the repeated name)
Token is the second occurrence of the subject name
Name ordering pattern in the sentence (sequence-level attribute)
The indirect object name appears before the subject name in the first clause
The subject name appears before the indirect object name in the first clause
